info.name: AviadLivian Copy
info.description:
## Overview

The **AviadLavian API** provides a secure authentication and user management system designed for scalable web applications. This API enables user registration, authentication, profile management, and role-based administrative control.

It is built with secure JWT authentication and structured RESTful endpoints following best practices.

---

## Base URL

The API uses environment variables for flexible deployment.

### Example Values:

```
{{domain}}  = https://aviadlavian.onrender.com
{{domain}}  = http://localhost:5000
{{baseapi}} = /api/v1

 ```

### 🔹 Full Endpoint Format:

```
{{domain}}{{baseapi}}/{resource}/{endpoint}

 ```

Example:

```
https://aviadlavian.onrender.com/api/v1/auth/login
or
http://localhost:5000/api/v1/auth/login

 ```
